subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letters were received, and thou, too, didst grace Alexandria with thy presence and service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان اوراق مرسوله رسید و شما هم تشریف آوردید باسکندریه و خدمت شما
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @newspapers and the media; publications, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
